    """Send a command and try to receive a JSON response. Returns parsed object or None.

        # Try simple JSON parsing; if it fails, attempt to extract a JSON array/object

            return json.loads(text)

            start_obj = text.find('{')
            end_obj = text.rfind('}')
            start_arr = text.find('[')
            end_arr = text.rfind(']')
            candidate = None
            if start_arr != -1 and end_arr != -1 and end_arr > start_arr:
                candidate = text[start_arr:end_arr+1]
            elif start_obj != -1 and end_obj != -1 and end_obj > start_obj:
                candidate = text[start_obj:end_obj+1]
            if candidate is not None:
                try:
                    return json.loads(candidate)
                except json.JSONDecodeError:
                    return None
            return None
    except (socket.timeout, OSError):
        # If timeout or recv error, return None; calling code can proceed with defaults
